record_id.description: RecordID is the stable identifier of the evidence record.

path.description: Path is the path to the evidence record artifact.

recorded_at.description: RecordedAt is the evidence record timestamp when one is tracked.

EvidencePointerState.description: EvidencePointerState points to one evidence record from the local state file.

ci.description: CI points to the latest CI evidence record when one exists.

publish.description: Publish points to the latest publish evidence record when one exists.

sync.description: Sync points to the latest sync evidence record when one exists.

EvidenceSetState.description: EvidenceSetState records the latest evidence pointers tracked in the local state file.

pr_url.description: PRURL is the pull request URL recorded for the land phase.

commit.description: Commit is the merge commit or landed commit recorded for the land phase.

landed_at.description: LandedAt is the timestamp when the land command recorded merge completion.

completed_at.description: CompletedAt is the timestamp when land cleanup completed.

LandState.description: LandState records the current land state in the local state file.

snapshot_id.description: SnapshotID is the legacy CI snapshot identifier.

status.description: Status is the cached legacy CI status.

LegacyCIState.description: LegacyCIState is the transitional CI cache retained in the local state file while status still reads legacy evidence hints directly.

attempt_id.description: AttemptID is the legacy publish attempt identifier.

pr_url.description: PRURL is the cached publish pull request URL.

LegacyPublishState.description: LegacyPublishState is the transitional publish cache retained in the local state file while status still reads legacy hints directly.

freshness.description: Freshness is the cached sync freshness label.

conflicts.description: Conflicts reports whether the cached sync state observed conflicts.

LegacySyncState.description: LegacySyncState is the transitional sync cache retained in the local state file while status still reads legacy hints directly.

execution_started_at.description: ExecutionStartedAt is the execution-start timestamp for the plan.

current_node.description: CurrentNode is the cached canonical workflow node when one has been resolved.

plan_path.description: PlanPath is the current tracked or archived plan path associated with this state file.

plan_stem.description: PlanStem is the durable plan stem associated with this state file.

revision.description: Revision is the current plan-local revision number.

reopen.description: Reopen records the active reopen repair state when one exists.

active_review_round.description: ActiveReviewRound records the current active review round when review is in flight.

latest_evidence.description: LatestEvidence records the latest evidence pointers tracked in the state file.

land.description: Land records the current land state when merge cleanup is in flight.

latest_ci.description: LatestCI is the transitional cached CI state retained while status still reads legacy evidence hints directly from state.json.

sync.description: Sync is the transitional cached sync state retained while status still reads legacy hints directly from state.json.

latest_publish.description: LatestPublish is the transitional cached publish state retained while status still reads legacy hints directly from state.json.

LocalStateFile.description: LocalStateFile is the plan-local runtime state cache under `.local/harness/plans/<plan-stem>/state.json`.

mode.description: Mode is the active reopen mode.

base_step_count.description: BaseStepCount is the number of plan steps that existed before the reopen.

ReopenState.description: ReopenState records the active reopen repair state.

round_id.description: RoundID is the stable identifier for the review round.

kind.description: Kind is the review kind for the round.

step.description: Step is the tracked plan step number when the round is step-scoped.

revision.description: Revision is the plan-local revision associated with the round.

aggregated.description: Aggregated reports whether the round has already been aggregated.

decision.description: Decision is the aggregate review decision when one is known.

ReviewRoundState.description: ReviewRoundState records the current active review round in the local state file.
